findings.message: dict(state.now_streaming) shallow copy race — fixed with copy.deepcopy in streamer.py and producer.py heartbeat.
mammamiradio_queue_depth always 0 — documented placeholder, v2 concern.
Debounce bypass for session_stopped=True is intentional — heartbeat has 30s rate limiting. Not a bug.
_ha_heartbeat_task GC risk — mitigated: asyncio event loop holds strong reference to scheduled tasks. del applied to make intent explicit.
